description: Uso do Claude Code na organização — tokens, custo, modelos, tools, heatmap por dia/hora, usuários. Fonte: telemetria OTLP nativa do Claude Code (https://code.claude.com/docs/en/monitoring-usage).

panels.title: 🗓️ Heatmap de uso (hora × dia da semana)

panels.description: Heatmap temporal mostrando volume de eventos ao longo do tempo. Eixo X = hora do dia (UTC), Eixo Y = contagem total de eventos por hora (log entries), Cor = intensidade (número de eventos). Útil para visualizar picos de uso por hora.
panels.title: Volume de Eventos por Hora (contagem de log entries)

targets.expr: {service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${model:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | line_format "user={{.attributes_user_email}} model={{.attributes_model}} input={{.attributes_input_tokens}} output={{.attributes_output_tokens}} cost={{.attributes_cost_usd}}"

avg by (attributes_effort) (avg_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${model:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_duration_ms [$__range]))

topk(20, sum by (attributes_user_email) (sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${model:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range])))

avg by (attributes_model) (avg_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_cost_usd [$__range]))

sum by (attributes_model) (sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__range])) / (sum by (attributes_model) (sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_cache_read_tokens [$__range])) + sum by (attributes_model) (sum_over_time({service_name=~"claude-code|cowork"} | json | body="claude_code.api_request" | __error__="" ${user_email:pipe} ${effort:pipe} ${query_source:pipe} ${terminal_type:pipe} | unwrap attributes_input_tokens [$__range])))

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate (cache tokens / (cache tokens + input tokens))

title: Claude Code Usage
